segments.text: They manage to push off-stage with Flash Punch, but
segments.original_text: 閃光烈拳でなんとか崖外に追い出しますが
まだ撃墜には至らない

segments.text: up special, the valiant Devil Wink, but
segments.original_text: 上必殺技、果敢なデビルウィンクですが

full_text: And there's the Whirlwind! They manage to push off-stage with Flash Punch, but it's still not the KO! up special, the valiant Devil Wink, but and that also gets avoided!

corrections.original: 駆け外に追い出しますが
corrections.corrected: 崖外に追い出しますが

corrections.original: まだ激戦には至らない
corrections.corrected: まだ撃墜には至らない
